subcodes.title: Du’a’ li’sh-Shajarati’l-Ula va man i’sta'zalla fi zillih
subcodes.first_line: O Lord, my God! Shower Thy blessings upon the Tree of Thy Unity, and rain down upon it that which befitteth the loftiness of Thy bounty and the sovereignty of Thy divine Oneness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الامنع الاقدس. لتصلین اللهم رب علی شجرة وحدانیتک و لتنزلن اللهم علیها ما ینبغی لعلو جودک و ملیک عز صمدانیتک
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @Letters of the Living, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @prayer for praise and gratitude
